name: Macaroni with Ham and Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 cups asparagus tips and stems (fresh, cut into 1-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the asparagus until tender.
2. Saute chopped onions in butter until pale in color.
3. Add diced ham and saute for 2 minutes.
4. Reduce heat and add heavy cream. Cook for 30 seconds off the heat.
5. Pour over cooked macaroni and toss with grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Serve with extra cheese on the side.
